targets.rawSql: SELECT low_risk_rate, medium_risk_rate, high_risk_rate FROM market_benchmarks WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT fetch_type, confidence_score, fetched_at, expires_at, CASE WHEN expires_at > NOW() THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'EXPIRED' END as status FROM market_benchmarks WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 5;

SELECT AVG(la.quoted_rate - CASE la.risk_band WHEN 'Low' THEN mb.low_risk_rate WHEN 'Medium' THEN mb.medium_risk_rate WHEN 'High' THEN mb.high_risk_rate END) as avg_spread_over_market FROM loan_applications la CROSS JOIN (SELECT * FROM market_benchmarks WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1) mb;

panels.title: Quoted Rate vs Market Benchmark by Risk Band

targets.rawSql: SELECT la.risk_band, AVG(la.quoted_rate) as avg_quoted_rate, AVG(la.min_rate_floor) as avg_rate_floor, AVG(CASE la.risk_band WHEN 'Low' THEN mb.low_risk_rate WHEN 'Medium' THEN mb.medium_risk_rate WHEN 'High' THEN mb.high_risk_rate END) as market_benchmark FROM loan_applications la CROSS JOIN (SELECT * FROM market_benchmarks WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1) mb GROUP BY la.risk_band ORDER BY la.risk_band;
SELECT acceptance_probability, risk_band FROM loan_applications ORDER BY acceptance_probability;

panels.title: Scenario: What-If Rate Floor Tightens?
panels.description: Simulates how many applications change from APPROVE to DECLINE if PD threshold drops from 10% to 5%

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'Current (PD < 10%)' as scenario, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pd_ensemble < 0.10) as approvals, SUM(amt_credit) FILTER (WHERE pd_ensemble < 0.10) as total_exposure, AVG(expected_profit) FILTER (WHERE pd_ensemble < 0.10) as avg_profit FROM loan_applications UNION ALL SELECT 'Tightened (PD < 5%)', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pd_ensemble < 0.05), SUM(amt_credit) FILTER (WHERE pd_ensemble < 0.05), AVG(expected_profit) FILTER (WHERE pd_ensemble < 0.05) FROM loan_applications UNION ALL SELECT 'Loosened (PD < 15%)', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pd_ensemble < 0.15), SUM(amt_credit) FILTER (WHERE pd_ensemble < 0.15), AVG(expected_profit) FILTER (WHERE pd_ensemble < 0.15) FROM loan_applications;
SELECT created_at as time, expected_profit, pd_ensemble, risk_band FROM loan_applications WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at;

panels.title: Rate Spread: Quoted vs Floor Over Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) as time, AVG(quoted_rate) as avg_quoted_rate, AVG(min_rate_floor) as avg_rate_floor, AVG(quoted_rate - min_rate_floor) as avg_margin FROM loan_applications WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
